Spy! (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $110,825,712Details
International Box Office $123,018,394
Worldwide Box Office $233,844,106
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $16,805,003
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,731,822
Total $24,536,825
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Susan Cooper is an unassuming, deskbound CIA analyst, and the unsung hero behind the Agency’s most dangerous missions. But when her partner falls off the grid and another top agent is compromised, she volunteers to go deep undercover to infiltrate the world of a deadly arms dealer, and prevent a global disaster.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$29,085,719 (26.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.81 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,711 opening theaters/3,715 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $157,233,157

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 5th, 2015 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: May 21st, 2015 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
May 21st, 2015 (Wide) (Malaysia)
May 21st, 2015 (Wide) (Philippines)
May 21st, 2015 (Wide) (Singapore)
May 21st, 2015 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: September 1st, 2015 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language throughout, violence, and some sexual content including brief graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2365, 3/18/2015)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Digital Cinematography, Directing Yourself, Improvised, Intertitle, Outtakes During Credits, Slow Motion Scene
Plot point: Big Break, C.I.A., Double Agent, Faked Death, False Identity, Non-Chronological, Secret Agent, Surprise Twist, Terrorism, Undercover
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Chernin Entertainment, Feigco Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Susan Cooper is an unassuming, deskbound CIA analyst, and the unsung hero behind the Agency’s most dangerous missions. But when her partner falls off the grid and another top agent is compromised, she volunteers to go deep undercover to infiltrate the world of a deadly arms dealer, and prevent a global disaster.
